title: Status of the paywall for monday apps
excerpt:
Hi team, 
Our app Bird’s eye view recently got accepted in the marketplace. 
After the trial period, will users be automatically restricted from using the app, or is this something we have to implement from our end? 
Tha…

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,
Our app Bird’s eye view recently got accepted in the marketplace.

After the trial period, will users be automatically restricted from using the app, or is this something we have to implement from our end?

Thank you.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: You can do that on your end but monday automatically shows a request to purchase page when the trial period for users end.
